releaseNotes: v0.25.4 — Bulk-move active inventory to the Pulled list. A new one-tap action in Settings (Demo & data) moves every Active medication to the Pulled list, gated by a confirmation dialog that shows the active-item count. Built for the start-a-fresh-count workflow: clears the active dashboard in a single step instead of pulling bottles one at a time. This is a real pull, NOT a delete — every bottle gets a Pulled entry in the Activity log, full history is preserved, and the bottles stay on the Return Manifest. Multi-device-safe (a pull op is emitted per item) and idempotent (already-non-Active rows are skipped). 418 tests passing.
